executives.name: Joe Dick
executives.background: Joe Dick has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Eldorado before transitioning to a strategic role.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

board_of_directors.name: Judith Mosely
board_of_directors.background: Judith Mosely has over 20 years of experience in the mining finance sector, including senior roles at Société Générale.

board_of_directors.name: Pamela Gibson
board_of_directors.background: Pamela Gibson is a former partner at Shearman & Sterling LLP with extensive experience in international corporate finance and M&A.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Reid
board_of_directors.background: Steven Reid has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was formerly Chief Operating Officer of Goldcorp Inc. and has held senior positions at Placer Dome and BHP.

board_of_directors.name: Teresa Conway
board_of_directors.background: Teresa Conway is a former executive with over 25 years of experience in the energy sector, including as President and CEO of Powerex Corp.
